note: Canonical doc work-list driving Phase 2 code-first reconstruction. legacy_refs are for the post-draft GAP-CHECK only (never copied from). tier: 1=load-bearing, 2=important, 3=minor.

categories.02_execution_core: Gateway, sessions, execution engine, task hub, dispatch, durable, URW, workspaces
categories.03_agents: VP workers, Simone orchestration, heartbeat, cron, idle dispatch, agent college
categories.04_intelligence: CSI, intel lanes, research, wiki, memory, proactive pipeline, mission control, discord intel
categories.05_channels: Email/AgentMail, webhooks, telegram, discord ops, web-ui communication
categories.06_platform: Secrets/Infisical, runtime bootstrap, identity/auth, deployment/CI, environments, networking
categories.07_tools: MCP server, tools/bridges, SDK integration, skills
categories.08_operations: Operating playbook, verification rules, dormancy, VPS recovery, incident patterns

docs.title: System Architecture Overview
docs.scope: Top-level topology: principals (Simone/Cody/Atlas), gateway, what-talks-to-what, process model. The map a newcomer reads first.

docs.title: Task Lifecycle End-to-End
docs.scope: Trace one unit of work ingress→queue→claim→execute→finalize→deliver across channels.

docs.title: Database Architecture
docs.scope: DB inventory, schema, segregation boundaries (activity_state.db is canonical Task Hub DB, NOT task_hub.db), pruning. Resolve via canonical path functions.

docs.title: Model Choice & Resolution
docs.scope: resolve_opus/sonnet/haiku, ZAI proxy vs Anthropic-native routing, the three execution profiles, inference health governance.

docs.title: Hook System Architecture
docs.scope: Hook lifecycle, permissions, subagent architecture as wired in code.

docs.title: Event Streaming & Tracing
docs.scope: AgentEvent emission, event stream protocol, transcript/trace building, Logfire links.

docs.title: Gateway, Sessions & Execution
docs.scope: Gateway protocol, InProcessGateway, ProcessTurnAdapter, session lifecycle/locking, WebSocket streaming, timeouts. (Audit: legacy was ACCURATE — high gap-check value.)

docs.title: Task Hub & Dispatch
docs.scope: Data model, dispatch queue build+ranking, atomic claiming, stale release, execution runs, action verbs, worker-exit classification, observability protocol. (Audit: legacy had MAJOR drift — rebuild from code.)

docs.title: Durable Execution
docs.scope: Durable state, tool-call ledger, worker pool, tool classification, checkpointing.

docs.title: URW Orchestration
docs.scope: Multi-phase task orchestration: decomposer, phase planner, evaluator, evaluation policy, state/artifacts.

docs.title: Workspaces & Artifacts
docs.scope: Workspace resolution (4-tier fallback), artifacts dir resolution, run workspaces, guardrails, remote sync.

docs.title: SDK Lifecycle Hooks & Guardrails
docs.scope: PreToolUse/PostToolUse guardrail engine: tool gating (DISALLOWED_TOOLS), workspace write guard, heartbeat write allowlist, code-mutation actor resolution, subagent detection, TaskStop rejection, tool-call event emission. Distinct from 05_hook_system (webhook ingress).

docs.title: VP Workers & Delegation
docs.scope: CODIE/ATLAS lanes, mission dispatch/queueing, priority tiers (operator_daily/operator_signal/maintenance/background), profiles, execution clients, worker loop, redis bridge, factory heartbeat/registry, cody-mode routing, goal loop, failure rescue. (Audit: legacy had MAJOR drift — rebuild from code.)

docs.title: Simone-First Orchestration
docs.scope: Simone-first routing model, agent router (note: qualify_agent* are decommissioned). NOTE: /btw IS real (handler in gateway_server.py + session_hub.py); the earlier 'vaporware' audit finding was wrong — document it, do not remove.

docs.title: Heartbeat Service
docs.scope: Heartbeat loop, max_proactive_per_cycle, findings schema/contract, auto-triage→Simone. Heartbeat does health/proactive only, NOT trusted-email execution.

docs.title: Cron & Scheduling
docs.scope: Cron registration, deploy-window detection (suppress restart noise), catch-up, system cron jobs. Dormancy mechanics cross-ref operations doc.

docs.title: Idle Dispatch & Goal Loop
docs.scope: Idle dispatch nudge mechanism, goal loop & completion attestation, failure-mode classification & rescue verbs.

docs.title: Agent College
docs.scope: Failure-analysis learning loop (if present/active in code; dispose if dead).

docs.title: CSI Architecture
docs.scope: CSI overall: convergence pipeline, vault intelligence pass/persistence, db split-brain (_csi_default_db_path), content-safety fail-closed gotcha.

docs.title: URL Judging & Research Grounding
docs.scope: Three-pass URL enrichment (pre-filter→LLM judge (resolve_opus)→fetch), trust_source bypass, research_grounding allowlist (separate path). (Audit: legacy said resolve_sonnet — wrong; it's resolve_opus.)

docs.title: Intel Lanes Configuration
docs.scope: Lane config schema, cron schedule (3x daily 08/16/22 CT), research_allowlist semantics.

docs.title: ClaudeDevs X Intelligence
docs.scope: @ClaudeDevs polling lane, packet outputs, vault-as-canonical-product. Consolidate the 11-file fragmentation into one canonical doc.

docs.title: YouTube CSI Flow
docs.scope: YouTube feeds topology, dual-pipeline (UA-native playlist watcher vs CSI RSS feed — separate DBs), residential proxy ingestion.

docs.title: Demo Triage
docs.scope: Demo candidate store, ranking, triage policy.

docs.title: LLM Wiki System
docs.scope: Vault management, internal sync/projection, query, LLM extraction, kb registry. (Audit: legacy had MAJOR drift incl. resolve_vault_path ignoring vault_kind — verify current code, flag if still a bug.)

docs.title: Memory System
docs.scope: Tiered memory, memory store/index, vector backends (Chroma/Lance), orchestrator, feature flags.

docs.title: Lossless Memory
docs.scope: DAG compression & SQLite history.

docs.title: Proactive Pipeline
docs.scope: raw→knowledge blocks→bounded retrieval→LLM synthesis→gated action. Consolidate the 3 proactive docs + audits. Note which producer lanes are/aren't wired end-to-end.

docs.title: Mission Control Intelligence
docs.scope: Operator intelligence surface, supervisor snapshots (note: Operator Brief panel removed Phase 8).

docs.title: Discord Intelligence
docs.scope: Discord message pipeline, triage, calendar sync (gws materialization).

docs.title: Email / AgentMail
docs.scope: WebSocket ingress, pre-triage security/quarantine, target-agent detection (label is agent-codie NOT agent-cody), task-bridge materialization, tags, Gmail 429 fallback, trusted-inbox queue.

docs.title: Webhook Architecture
docs.scope: Webhook handlers & ops. Note: production email ingress uses WebSocket, not webhook; webhook path needs reply-extraction parity if reactivated.

docs.title: Telegram Channel
docs.scope: Polling bot (not webhook), tg_<user_id> session scheme, allowlist (TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS — naming-drift gotcha), gateway-bypass architectural note.

docs.title: Discord Operations
docs.scope: Discord bot operations & usage (operator-facing).

docs.title: Web UI Communication
docs.scope: Chat panel ingress/tracking, activity log layer, task hub dashboard contract, AG-UI streaming, dashboard auth surface.

docs.title: Secrets & Infisical
docs.scope: Infisical as SSOT, initialize_runtime_secrets, bootstrap-identity-key immutability (overwrite=True but identity preserved), env rendering, dev mirrors prod. (Audit: legacy had minor drift — --secret-env flag, token fallback order.)

docs.title: Runtime Bootstrap & Profiles
docs.scope: Runtime stage resolution {development,staging,local,production}, deployment profiles, factory role policy, machine identity.

docs.title: Identity & Auth
docs.scope: Identity registry/resolver, email recipient resolution, ops auth (JWT + legacy token), dashboard auth (cookie+HMAC), three trust surfaces. Flag the dev-secret-fallback security gap if still present.

docs.title: Deployment & CI/CD
docs.scope: Branch model (any→PR→main→deploy; develop retired; feature/latest2 retired), pr-validate gates, auto-merge allowlist + PAT, concurrency guard, healthcheck gates, paths-ignore, crashloop abort. (Audit: legacy had MAJOR drift — concurrency 'not yet implemented' but it shipped; feature/latest2 stale in pr-validate.)

docs.title: Execution Environments
docs.scope: Three Claude execution profiles (interactive Max / autonomous ZAI / Cody Anthropic-default-since-2026-05-11), local dev (just dev), demo execution, model routing. Fix stale 'zai default' code comment note.

docs.title: Networking: Tailscale, Proxy, SSHFS
docs.scope: Tailscale (uaonvps MagicDNS vs srv1360701 raw hostname), residential proxy (DataImpulse default/Webshare failover, VPS-only), SSHFS cross-machine mount.

docs.title: MCP Server & Tools
docs.scope: FastMCP server, tool registry/discovery, bridge architecture, research pipeline tools, workspace resolution in tools, circuit breakers.

docs.title: SDK Integration
docs.scope: Claude Agent SDK integration helpers, session history adapter, runtime info, task events, harness planning phase.

docs.title: Skills System
docs.scope: Skills architecture, invocation by principals, dependency/gated-binary setup. SKILL.md is canonical per-skill.

docs.title: Agent Operating Playbook
docs.scope: How agents should operate (operator-facing playbook). Reconcile against current code behavior where it makes process claims.

docs.title: Production Verification Rules
docs.scope: Ship-then-verify cadence, /api/v1/version SHA check, branch-vs-deploy honesty, backend vs UI verification paths.

docs.title: Dormancy & Operating Hours
docs.scope: 6AM-10PM Houston active window, content-gen vs infra-event distinction, documented exceptions, guard test.

docs.title: VPS Recovery & Security
docs.scope: Watchdog/timers, service recovery, host hardening, daily ops. Operator runbook — preserve still-valid operational facts.

docs.title: Incident Response Patterns
docs.scope: Recurring incident classes + recovery: rogue autonomous branch, .venv corruption, gateway wedge, event-loop starvation. Distilled patterns, not dated reports.

docs.title: Self-Improving CLAUDE.md Stop Hook
docs.scope: Desktop-local Stop hook that reflects on each session and drafts CLAUDE.md improvement proposals for review. Scope/safety design, env knobs, review+troubleshooting runbook.
